subject: [PATCH v1 2/2] mm/memory: add anonymous mTHP folios to deferred split list

2026-07-07.patch_summary: This patch adds anonymous mTHP (huge page) folios to the deferred split list, ensuring that they are split and reclaimed when memory pressure is high. This addresses a problem where fully mapped zero-filled mTHPs were not being split by the deferred shrinker, leading to wasted memory. The patch minimizes overhead on the common fault path by using an inline check for large folios before adding them to the deferred list.
